name: Simulated Create – Safety Maintenance Concern
scenario_description: Emma Brown (Platinum) observed a maintenance issue on ZA101. Tests Safety / Critical severity path.
complaint_description: During boarding on flight ZA101 I noticed a visible crack along the overhead compartment panel above row 14. I reported it to a crew member who said it would be noted but no action was taken before departure. This is a serious structural concern that should have grounded the aircraft.
